<div class="row">
<div class="large-5 medium-6 small-12 columns">
<h5 class="center"><img src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/images/uwestlogo.png" alt="uwestlogo"></h5>
<p class="para">The rights of the materials herein are as indicated by the source(s)
cited.

href="http://www.uwest.edu"> University
of the West </a> where permitted by law. See <a href="https://www.dsbcproject.org/pages/usage-policy"> Usage Policy </a> for details.
</p>
</div>
<div class="large-3 medium-6 small-12 columns">

Rosemead, California 91770, U.S.A</span></li>

<li><i class="fa fa-envelope fa-imp" aria-hidden="true"></i>

</li>

<div class="large-4 medium-6 small-12 columns">
<h5 class="foot-text">Newsletter</h5>
<p class="para">Subscribe to our newsletter for latest updates about the canon text of
our
project</p>
<p class="status" id="status" style="color:yellow;"></p>
<form method="post" id="reg-form">
<input type="email" name="email" id="email" required
placeholder="Email Address" aria-describedby="exampleHelpText" class="news">
<input type="hidden" name="_token" value="VQLRQpmLUNx0NWDsCIkbJ4Tw4mzO8G9UNqpBcrED">
<button type="submit" class="button subscribe">SUBSCRIBE</button>
</form>

</p>
</div>

<div id="myModal" class="reveal" data-reveal style="width: 650px; margin-top:0px !important;">

<form action="https://www.dsbcproject.org/search" method="GET">

<div style="margin-bottom: 5px">
<label>Choose Your Search Item</label>
<input type="radio" name="searchItem" value="books" id="books" required><label
for="pokemonRed">Books</label>
<input type="radio" name="searchItem" value="bookLinks" id="bookLinks"><label
for="pokemonBlue">BookLinks</label>
</div>

<div style="margin-bottom: 5px">
<label>Choose Your Match Type</label>
<input type="radio" name="matchType" value="exactMatch" id="pokemonRed"
required><label for="pokemonRed">Match multiple fields</label>

<input type="radio" name="matchType" value="partialMatch" id="pokemonBlue"><label
for="pokemonBlue">Match partial fields</label>
</div>


<label>
Title
<input type="text" name="title" placeholder="Title">
</label>


<label id="author">
Author
<input type="text" name="author" placeholder="Author">
</label>

<label>
Text Language
<input type="text" name="text-version" placeholder="Eg. Romanized, Devnagari etc.">
</label>

<label id="publisher">
Publisher
<input type="text" name="publisher" placeholder="Publisher">
</label>

<label>
Published Date
<input type="date" name="input_date" placeholder="Input Date">
</label>

<label>
Category
<select name="category" id="category">
<option value="">Select Cateogry</option>
<option value="1"> Romanized</option>
<option value="77"> देवनागरी</option>
</select>
</label>
<br>

<button class="button" type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>
<button class="close-button" data-close aria-label="Close modal" type="button">
<span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span>
</button>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/jquery-2.1.4.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/foundation.js"></script>
<script>
$(document).foundation();
</script>

<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/script.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/jquery-1.10.2.min.js"></script>

<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>

<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/dataTables.foundation.js"></script>

<script type="text/javascript" charset="utf-8">
$(document).ready(function () {
$('#example').dataTable({
aLengthMenu: [
[25, 50, 100, 200, -1],
[25, 50, 100, 200, "All"]
],
iDisplayLength: 25
});
});
</script>

<script src="https://www.dsbcproject.org/js/cloudslider.jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jquery-validation@1.19.5/dist/jquery.validate.js"></script>

<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
$('#bookLinks').on('change', function() {
if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
$('#author').hide();
$('#publisher').hide();
}
});

$('#books').on('change', function() {
if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
$('#author').show();
$('#publisher').show();
}
});

$("#openModalButton").click(function() {
$("#myModal").foundation("open");
$("#mostSearchedSection").show();
});

// $("#book-search-form").validate({
// rules: {
// 'book-title': {
// required: true,
// minlength: 3,
// },
// },
// messages: {
// 'book-title': {
// required: "Please enter the title",
// minlength: "Title must be at least 3 characters long",
// },
// },
// });

$("#news-search-form").validate({
rules: {
'news-title': {
required: true,
minlength: 3,
},
},
messages: {
'news-title': {
required: "Please enter the title",
minlength: "Title must be at least 3 characters long",
},
},
});

$("#booklink-search-form").validate({
rules: {
'booklink-title': {
required: true,
minlength: 3,
},
},
messages: {
'booklink-title': {
required: "Please enter the title",
minlength: "Title must be at least 3 characters long",
},
},
});
});

$("#cloudslider-mobile").cloudSlider({
width: 242,
height: 497,
navType: 'none',
progressBarPosition: 'hide',
autoplaySpeed: 1000,

arrow: {
visibility: 'hide'
}
});

$(document).ready(function() {
$(document).on('submit', '#reg-form', function(event) {
event.preventDefault();
var email = $("#email").val();
$.ajax({
type: 'POST',
url: 'http://www.dsbcproject.org/newsletter/new-subscription',
data: {
email: email,
_token: 'VQLRQpmLUNx0NWDsCIkbJ4Tw4mzO8G9UNqpBcrED'
},
success: function(response) {
$("#status").html(response.message);
},
error: function(response) {
$("#status").html(response.message);
},
});
});
});

{
"@context": "https://schema.org/",
"@type": "WebSite",
"name": "Digital Sanakrit Buddhist Canon",
"url": "http://dsbcproject.org",
"potentialAction": {
"@type": "SearchAction",
"target": "http://dsbcproject.org/search?q={search_term_string}",
"query-input": "required name=search_term_string"
}
}
